reason: Helm_of_Telepathy.md is truncated mid-sentence in the SRD dump ('though the creature'); the completion mirrors the identical telepathy wording on Extraordinary_Powers_of_Sentient_Swords.md ('though it is not compelled to respond').

set.manual.4: Bidirectional communication: The wearer may initiate bidirectional, telepathic communication, though the creature is not compelled to respond.
